keys.description: Default invoice_series prefix when the tenant does not override + does not hold invoice_custom_series entitlement. Small tenants are locked to 'INV'.
true = counter resets to 1 on Jan 1st of each year (2026-000001 → 2027-000001). false = monotonically increasing (rare — some jurisdictions prefer this).

String template. Placeholders: {series?} (empty when series='INV' AND per-year-reset AND small tier — for cleaner default), {year} (4 digits), {seq:06} (6-digit zero-padded). Override for tenants that need a specific format for regulatory reasons.
Fixed prefix for credit note numbers. Format: CN-{YYYY}-{seq:06}.

Template name. Options: 'stackra-default' (Small tier), 'tenant-branded' (Medium+ with invoice_tenant_branded_pdf), 'minimal' (compact single-page), 'vat-eu' (VAT-jurisdiction-compliant layout for EU tenants).
PDF driver. 'dompdf' (default; HTML+CSS; ~200-500ms) or 'wkhtmltopdf' (better CSS support; slower). Enterprise-only tenants may switch.
Paper size. A4 (default; ISO 216) or LETTER (US 8.5x11).
Laravel filesystem disk for PDF storage. Should have SSE-KMS encryption + lifecycle rule for Glacier migration after 7 years.
TTL for signed S3 URLs. 168 hours = 7 days. Regenerated on each viewer request via a dedicated signing service.
true = SendInvoiceEmailJob is dispatched automatically when the invoice transitions to 'open'. false = admin must manually invoke POST /invoices/{invoice}/send.
Delivery channel for invoice notifications. Delegates to the notifications module.
BCC list applied to every invoice email. Typically empty; tenants may configure their finance-team email here via settings.
true = the invoice email includes a tracking pixel that fires InvoiceViewed on open. false = disable (some tenants prefer for privacy).
Days past due at which dunning reminders fire. Default: day+3 / day+7 / day+14 / day+30 / day+60. Enterprise tenants with invoice_dunning_advanced may override via settings.
Minimum days past due before an invoice can be marked uncollectible.
Copy severity tone per cadence stage. friendly → reminder → firm → final → collections.
true = pause the dunning schedule when the customer responds to an invoice (opens payment link, contacts support). false = keep dunning firing regardless.
Days past due at which EscalateDunningToCollectionsJob fires. Enterprise-only (requires invoice_collections_integration).
Days past due at which an invoice may be marked written_off. Typically 6 months after past-due.
Default third-party collections agency slug. Configured per-tenant via settings; this is the platform-level default.
invoices retention. 10 years for Enterprise tenants with invoice_extended_retention entitlement.
credit_notes retention. Same tier-driven extension as invoices.
invoice_lines retention. Cascaded via FK RESTRICT — cannot be shorter than parent invoice.
PDFs remain in S3 hot storage this long. After, migrate to S3 Glacier (Enterprise: 10 years hot).
true = InvoiceObserver refuses finalize when any line lacks tax_calculation_id. false = allow finalization without tax (rare — some jurisdictions permit late-tax addition).
true = dispatch CalculateInvoiceTaxJob when a line is created without tax_calculation_id. false = require the caller to supply tax_calculation_id (rare).
Rounding mode for tax + line total computations. 'banker' (banker's rounding — half-to-even; avoids bias) or 'half_up' (traditional; used in some jurisdictions).
ReconcileInvoicePaymentsJob only reconciles invoices updated in the last N hours. Full-history reconciliation is expensive; a 48-hour rolling window catches recent drift.
Baseline for reconciliation alerts. Any finding above this is a P1 signal (transaction module drift).
Platform-wide default currency. Overridden by tenant.default_currency (from the tenancy module's settings).
Platform-wide flag; the tenant-level invoice_multi_currency entitlement is the authoritative gate.
